title: Add --dest-precompute-digests option for docker
body:
This ensures layers are not uploaded that already exist on the
destination registry, in exchange for streaming layers to temporary
files when digests are unknown (ex. compressing "on the fly").

Signed-off-by: Paul Fisher <pfisher@lyft.com>

comments.body: This PR pulls in tip of main on containers/image for https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1393. I can rebase this PR after skopeo gets bumped to a new containers/image release.
